classObjective: Rewrite exponential functions so rates share the same time unit for direct comparison.
workedExamples: 8-4, Example 1 — Compare Compounding Interest and Growth Rates (Effective Annual Rates)
warmUp: Convert a 12% annual rate to a monthly rate
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: effective annual rates; converting between compounding periods using exponent properties; direct rate comparison
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice comparing exponential rates by converting to common time units
independentPractice: Practice problems converting between compounding periods and comparing rates
assessment: Exit ticket: compare 10% compounded annually vs. 9.5% compounded monthly — which is better?
capReflection: Why is it necessary to convert to the same time unit before comparing exponential rates?
